tasks.subject: create-agent-two-step-flow [P3] Add directory browser button with DirectoryPicker integration
tasks.description:
Add a `FolderOpen` icon button next to the directory override input in the configure step. Clicking it opens the `DirectoryPicker` modal. When the user selects a directory, it populates the `directoryOverride` field. ## File to modify ### `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-creation/ui/CreateAgentDialog.tsx` #### New imports Add to existing imports: ```typescript import { DirectoryPicker } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; ``` `FolderOpen` from `lucide-react` should already be imported from the Phase 2 rewrite. If not, add it. #### New state Add state for the directory picker modal: ```typescript const [directoryPickerOpen, setDirectoryPickerOpen] = useState(false); ``` Update `resetForm` to include: ```typescript setDirectoryPickerOpen(false); ``` #### Update the directory override collapsible content In the configure step's directory override collapsible, add the browse button next to the input and the DirectoryPicker component: ```typescript
setDirectoryOverride(e.target.value)} className="flex-1" />
``` #### DirectoryPicker component Render the `DirectoryPicker` modal inside the dialog component (outside the AnimatePresence, inside the Dialog): ```typescript { setDirectoryOverride(path); if (!directoryOpen) setDirectoryOpen(true); }} /> ``` The `initialPath` uses the current override if set, otherwise falls back to the default directory. When a directory is selected: 1. Set the directory override to the selected path 2. Open the directory collapsible if it was closed (so the user can see the override) ## Acceptance criteria - `FolderOpen` icon button appears next to the directory input in the collapsible - Clicking the button opens the `DirectoryPicker` modal - `DirectoryPicker` opens at `directoryOverride` path if set, otherwise at `defaultDirectory` - Selecting a directory in the picker populates `directoryOverride` - If the directory collapsible was closed, selecting a directory opens it - The directory preview text updates to reflect the new override - Closing the picker without selecting does not change the override - The picker modal is properly layered above the create dialog - `data-testid="browse-directory-button"` is present for test targeting
tasks.activeForm: Adding directory browser button with DirectoryPicker integration

create-agent-two-step-flow [P4] Verify entry point backward compatibility across callers
tasks.description:
Verify that all existing callers of `useAgentCreationStore` still compile and function correctly after the store rename. This is a verification task — run the existing tests for each caller and confirm they pass.

## Callers to verify

### 1. AddAgentMenu (`apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-sidebar/ui/AddAgentMenu.tsx`)

- Uses `useAgentCreationStore.getState().open()` (line 32) — opens at method selection
- Uses `useAgentCreationStore.getState().open('import')` (line 43) — opens at import step
- **Test file**: `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-sidebar/__tests__/AddAgentMenu.test.tsx`

Run: `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-sidebar/__tests__/AddAgentMenu.test.tsx`

Expected: All tests pass. The `open()` function signature is unchanged — it still accepts `(mode?: CreationMode)` where `CreationMode = 'new' | 'template' | 'import'`, the same literal union as the old `CreationTab`.

### 2. SidebarTabRow (`apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SidebarTabRow.tsx`)

- Uses `useAgentCreationStore.getState().open()` (line 145) — opens at method selection
- **Test file**: `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/__tests__/SidebarTabRow.test.tsx`

Run: `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/__tests__/SidebarTabRow.test.tsx`

Expected: All tests pass.

### 3. AgentsHeader (`apps/client/src/layers/features/top-nav/ui/AgentsHeader.tsx`)

- Uses `useAgentCreationStore((s) => s.open)` (line 30) — gets open function via selector
- **Test file**: `apps/client/src/layers/features/top-nav/__tests__/AgentsHeader.test.tsx`

Run: `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/top-nav/__tests__/AgentsHeader.test.tsx`

Expected: All tests pass.

### 4. Command Palette (`apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/model/use-palette-actions.ts`)

- Uses `useAgentCreationStore.getState().open()` somewhere in palette actions
- **Test files**: 
  - `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/__tests__/CommandPaletteDialog.test.tsx`
  - `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/__tests__/command-palette-integration.test.tsx`

Run: `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/__tests__/`

Expected: All tests pass.

### 5. TypeScript compilation check

Run: `pnpm tsc --noEmit` (from the client app directory or via turborepo)

This catches any type errors from the rename. The `CreationTab` deprecated alias should prevent breakage, but verify.

### What to fix if tests fail

If any test file references `initialTab` in `useAgentCreationStore.setState(...)` calls, update to `initialMode`. Common patterns:

```typescript
// OLD
useAgentCreationStore.setState({ isOpen: false, initialTab: 'new' });

// NEW
useAgentCreationStore.setState({ isOpen: false, initialMode: 'new' });
```

If any test file imports `CreationTab` and uses it in type annotations, either keep using `CreationTab` (it's still exported as a deprecated alias) or update to `CreationMode`.

## Acceptance criteria

- `AddAgentMenu.test.tsx` passes
- `SidebarTabRow.test.tsx` passes
- `AgentsHeader.test.tsx` passes
- `CommandPaletteDialog.test.tsx` and `command-palette-integration.test.tsx` pass
- TypeScript compiles with no errors
- No runtime errors when opening the dialog from any entry point
tasks.activeForm: Verifying entry point backward compatibility across callers
